framework.name: Visa TAP — 10+ Partners but Thin on Details
framework.description: Visa TAP described as 'open framework to distinguish legitimate AI agents from malicious bots, with 10+ partners including Akamai.' Visa Intelligent Commerce has 100+ partners building, 30+ in sandbox, 20+ agents integrating. Completed 'hundreds' of transactions in Dec 2025. Predicts millions by holiday 2026. Still no technical architecture detail.
framework.raw_quote: Visa completed hundreds of secure, agent-initiated transactions in December 2025 and predicts millions of agent-completed purchases by holiday 2026.

source.title: The Agentic Commerce Landscape: Who's Building What in 2026
